title: wedelia hirtella
intro: Wedelia hirtella, also known as yellow-flowered wedelia or yellow flowered creeping oxeye, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Wedelia hirtella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In traditional medicine, Wedelia hirtella can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
